name: That Wacky Alchemy!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>力</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>誘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>爆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a face-up Spell Card(s) in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zones is sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; destroy that target.
eff: If a face-up Spell Card(s) in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zones is sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 face-up monster on the field; destroy that target.

action: Activates if other cards are sent to the Graveyard
